title: phymatopteris shensiensis
intro: Phymatopteris shensiensis is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Phymatopteris shensiensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Phymatopteris shensiensis are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be used to treat various ailments.
